Workflow-based GitHub Pages proof can use the live html_url HTTP 2xx check when API status is empty.
GitHub REST/CLI workflow run evidence uses status and conclusion.

launchProofEvidenceFields.label: Pages site proof

launchProofEvidenceFields.nextAction: Run gh api repos/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/pages and the live URL check after the Pages workflow succeeds, then paste html_url, status or live_http=2xx, and https_enforced=true.

launchProofEvidenceFields.label: Pages workflow run proof
launchProofEvidenceFields.required: Selected joopark-pages.yml proof run must be completed successfully and linked; actualLatestRun is retained separately when push-triggered deploys are rejected.
launchProofEvidenceFields.nextAction: Run gh run list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --workflow joopark-pages.yml --limit 10 --json databaseId,status,conclusion,url,headSha,createdAt,updatedAt,event,displayTitle and paste the selected proof run plus any actualLatestRun context.

launchProofEvidenceReceipt:
JooPark Launch Proof Evidence Receipt
Status: ready for public proof review
Repo: biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects
Evidence repo: biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects
Repo resolution: source_repo

Evidence fields to fill:
- Pages site proof: html_url=https://biojuho.github.io/BIOJUHO-Projects/; status=not available; proof_source=live_url_http; live_http=200; live_url_ready=true; https_enforced=true
- Pages workflow run proof: status=completed; conclusion=success; url=https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/actions/runs/27335387581; headSha=fc5dc0504e067929125132932c98a8aab3e8286c
- Drift Watch workflow run proof: status=completed; conclusion=success; url=https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/actions/runs/27335387623; headSha=fc5dc0504e067929125132932c98a8aab3e8286c
- Evidence freshness proof: generatedAt=2026-06-11T09:05:42.116Z; evidenceFresh=true; evidenceExpiresAt=2026-06-12T09:05:42.116Z; postPublishEvidenceReady=true
- Release receipt proof: postLaunchVerificationReceipt=available; status=verified for archive
- Public claim guard proof: repoEvidenceReady=true; pagesEvidenceReady=true; workflowEvidenceReady=true; allDispatchReady=true; launchPacketReadyForExternalClaim=true; readyForExternalClaim=true

Required proof commands:
1. gh api repos/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/pages
2. gh run list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --workflow joopark-pages.yml --limit 10 --json databaseId,status,conclusion,url,headSha,createdAt,updatedAt,event,displayTitle
3. gh run list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --workflow joopark-drift-watch.yml --limit 10 --json databaseId,status,conclusion,url,headSha,createdAt,updatedAt,event,displayTitle
4. node scripts/capture-publish-evidence.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write
5. node scripts/capture-publish-evidence.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --markdown
6. copy System Status quality receipt after readyForExternalClaim=true

Next proof actions:
1. Pages site proof: nextAction=Run gh api repos/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/pages and the live URL check after the Pages workflow succeeds, then paste html_url, status or live_http=2xx, and https_enforced=true.
2. Pages workflow run proof: nextAction=Run gh run list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --workflow joopark-pages.yml --limit 10 --json databaseId,status,conclusion,url,headSha,createdAt,updatedAt,event,displayTitle and paste the selected proof run plus any actualLatestRun context.
3. Drift Watch workflow run proof: nextAction=Run gh run list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --workflow joopark-drift-watch.yml --limit 10 --json databaseId,status,conclusion,url,headSha,createdAt,updatedAt,event,displayTitle and paste status=completed, conclusion=success, url, and headSha.
4. Evidence freshness proof: nextAction=Run node scripts/capture-publish-evidence.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write after both workflow runs succeed, then paste generatedAt, evidenceFresh=true, evidenceExpiresAt, and postPublishEvidenceReady=true.
5. Release receipt proof: nextAction=Run node scripts/capture-publish-evidence.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --markdown and paste the archive-ready post-launch verification receipt only after readyForExternalClaim=true.
6. Public claim guard proof: nextAction=Run node scripts/capture-output-quality-audit.mjs --write after live proof is ready, then paste readyForExternalClaim=true and the external claim guard receipt.

Acceptance criteria:
- Pages site proof: GitHub Pages proof must provide html_url, HTTPS enforcement, and either API status=built or live URL HTTP 2xx.
- Pages workflow run proof: Selected joopark-pages.yml proof run must be completed successfully and linked; actualLatestRun is retained separately when push-triggered deploys are rejected.
- Drift Watch workflow run proof: Selected joopark-drift-watch.yml proof run must be completed successfully and linked.
- Evidence freshness proof: Saved evidence must be generated after dispatch and remain inside the freshness window.
- Release receipt proof: Post-launch verification receipt must be archive-ready only after live Pages, workflow evidence, and the external claim guard are ready.
- Public claim guard proof: Public claim remains blocked until release quality, live proof, and launch-packet external-claim guard are all true.
